blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 102 ft. Looking ahead, 34 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
